name: Hat Trick
description: Three rounds of a sprint, wall-ball shots to an elevated target, and heavy alternating dumbbell snatches, separated by long rest periods.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2022/9 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; 2 minutes per round then 4 minutes rest; performed in two overlapping heats
